__description__.uv_surface_flux: UV flux at the rock surface before passing through material [W/m^2].
__description__.uv_local_flux: UV flux at the microbe location after passing through rock [W/m^2].
__description__.uv_cumulative_exposure: Cumulative UV energy over time [J/m^2] (flux * time).
__description__.gcr_total_flux: Cosmic ray dose rate at the rock surface [Gy/year] (scaled from model GCR).
__description__.gcr_alpha_flux: GCR flux carried by helium nuclei.
__description__.gcr_hze_flux: GCR flux carried by heavy ions (HZE).
__description__.gcr_surface_flux: Cosmic ray dose rate at the rock surface [Gy/year] (scaled from model GCR).
__description__.gcr_local_flux: Cosmic ray flux at the microbe location after shielding.
__description__.gamma_surface_flux: Gamma-ray flux at the rock surface [W/m^2].
__description__.gamma_local_flux: Gamma-ray flux at the microbe location after shielding [W/m^2].
__description__.population_fraction: Current surviving fraction of the initial microbe population in this body (0–1).
